title: Gomphrena luzuliflora
taxonomy: Gomphrena luzuliflora is a species of flowering plant in the Amaranthaceae family. It is native to South America and is commonly known as a type of globethistle. As a member of the Amaranthaceae family, it is classified under the order Caryophyllales. The plant is further classified into the genus Gomphrena, which includes approximately 100 species of plants. Gomphrena luzuliflora is often cultivated for its ornamental value and is prized for its unique, globe-shaped flowers.
